name: Zassoumon

signature_move.name: Squeeze Vine
signature_move.description: 12Uses its vine arms to squeeze the enemy.Buries its arms to cause vines to rise up around the opponent and stabs them with extending thorns.

description: A subspecies of the Vegimon species whose body is completely green. Unlike Vegimon, it does not ripen and turn red; in turn, it has obtained the vitality of a weed, allowing it to survive no matter how many times it is cut or beaten. Its Special Move is using its vine arms to squeeze the enemy ( Squeeze Vine ).
